overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy rural landscape at dusk. The character travels along a dirt path from open grasslands past a windmill, through a forested area, and alongside a lake as rain begins to fall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant windmill

entered.detail: tall stone windmill with wooden blades visible on the horizon
single tall pine tree beside the path
winding dirt trail through the grass
large mossy boulders scattered in the grass
tall green grass covering the rolling hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassland under stormy dusk skies. Geralt walks along a dirt path toward a distant stone windmill, passing a lone pine tree. The landscape is open with scattered rocks and tall grass swaying in the wind.

scene_state.functional_zone: field with farm worker transitioning to forest edge

events.description: passing a field worker and entering the tree line with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking past a field worker and entering the wooded area

notable_agents.action: field worker bending over, tending to crops near a horse

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the left side of the path
pile of cut timber stacked beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes a field worker tending to crops on the right, with a horse grazing nearby. The stone windmill disappears behind as the path enters a more wooded area with a wooden fence appearing on the left and stacked logs on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shaded forest path surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming a dense canopy overhead
weathered wooden fence on the right side of the path
decaying logs lying beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The path winds through a dense forest with tall trees blocking most of the stormy sky. Wooden fences line both sides of the trail as Geralt continues walking through the sheltered woodland, with rock formations visible on the right.

events.description: exiting the forest canopy, revealing a large lake to the left
rain intensifies, becoming visibly heavier with streaks falling

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as the forest opens up to reveal the lake

entered.detail: calm lake surface reflecting the dark storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to an open lakeside view. The wooden fences disappear as the path runs alongside calm water. Rain begins to fall more visibly as dark clouds cover the sky, with distant mountains visible across the lake.

events.description: character turns head and body to look out over the lake

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeshore and pausing briefly to look out over the water

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail curving along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the winding lakeside path, occasionally glancing toward the water. The storm intensifies with visible rain streaks as the journey continues into the darkening landscape, with the path curving ahead into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural landscape that transforms from open, windy grasslands into a rain-swept lakeside trail. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path toward a distant stone windmill under stormy dusk skies, passing a lone pine tree and swaying tall grass. As he passes a field worker and a grazing horse, the open terrain shifts into a wooded area where the windmill vanishes and the path becomes enclosed by wooden fences and stacked logs. The scene then tightens as the trail winds through a dense forest of tall trees and rock formations before opening up once more to reveal a calm lake. Finally, the wooden fences disappear and the storm intensifies into visible rain streaks as the camera follows the winding path along the water toward distant mountains under a darkening sky.
